records.ety: [Prob. fr. Tivoli in Italy, a pleasure resort not far from Rome.]

defs: A game resembling bagatelle, played on a special oblong board or table (Tivoli board or Tivoli table), which has a curved upper end, a set of numbered compartments at the lower end, side alleys, and the surface studded with pins and sometimes furnished with numbered depressions or cups.
